value: Frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI components, Zustand state management. Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime), Prisma ORM. Payments: Stripe with webhooks. Storage: Firebase for images/videos. Real-time: Supabase Realtime channels for chat. Analytics: Vercel Analytics. Node 24.x runtime
